repositoryGates.basis: Current repository validation is green; exact-main deployment remains a separate gate.

typedSpecCompiler.basis: Typed ArtifactSpec validation and deterministic compiler gates passed.

portabilityPackage.basis: The immutable package install, upgrade, and mounted consumer journey passed.

productionJourney.basis: Requires a post-deploy exact-main production journey receipt.

fleetAvailability.basis: Pre-change fleet probes are baseline evidence only; rerun after exact-main deployment.

atlasUiRenders.basis: All 43 Atlas frames and the UI/PPTX render set were inspected; the final receipt binds the rebuilt bytes.

blindPreference.basis: Only independently identified human judgments may close this gate.

routingPromotion.basis: No production routing mutation is authorized.

fineTuningRun.basis: Fine-tuning requires separate data, provider, privacy, and budget authorization.
